$schema_note: Home Energy (smart_dashboards) panel UI tokens for AI-assisted design and code. Source: custom_components/smart_dashboards/frontend/shared-utils.js (:host + shared styles) and energy-panel.js (room cards, budget bar, modals). HA theme is overridden; palette is fixed dark.
theme_behavior: Panels set CSS variables on :host to override Home Assistant theme for a consistent dark grey + cyan accent experience.

card_surface.usage: Cards, room cards, modals (--card-background-color, --card-bg); same value as panel header bar

panel_header.usage: Sticky top bar with title and actions (.panel-header)

secondary_surface.usage: Elevated chrome: view tab strip, inputs, secondary panels (--secondary-background-color, --input-bg)

accent.usage: Primary actions, links, key metrics, active tab, icons on title

semantic_warning.usage: Warnings, enforcement badges, efficiency warm states

budget_bar_gradients.note: Room kWh bar uses tiered linear gradients (blues, oranges, reds, purples) in energy-panel.js — keep harmonious with accent #03a9f4

principles: Prefer fluid font sizes with CSS clamp(min, preferred vw, max) in dense dashboards (room headers, budget markers, stats).
Use tabular-nums for watts, kWh, and counts.
Title weight ~500–700 depending on hierarchy; panel title ~16px / weight 500.

layout.panel_container: Full viewport min-height; .content-area max-width ~1800px centered with horizontal padding.
layout.panel_header: Sticky top; z-index 100; backdrop-filter blur(12px); flex space-between; padding ~10px 16px.
layout.cards: Border-radius typically 10–12px; border 1px solid card-border; room cards use gradient header/footer strips at low opacity white.

buttons.primary: Accent fill, white text, hover lift + cyan shadow
buttons.secondary: input-bg fill, subtle border, hover light white overlay

view_tabs.container: secondary-background-color pill; active tab uses panel-accent fill and white text

format_preference.note: Both hex and rgb are valid in CSS; this project uses hex on :host tokens and rgb() where explicitly requested (panel header). Prefer CSS variables for new surfaces.

file_references.efficiency_detail_modal: energy-panel.js `.room-rating-modal-*`: dialog and footnote use --card-bg and --card-border; header strip --panel-header-background; hero solid card + subtle --panel-accent-dim radial; metric cards --secondary-background-color; close button --secondary-background-color + --input-border; overlay scrim rgba(0,0,0,0.55)
